MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Gordon Property Management is present. Represented by Michelle Biloux.
Attorney, Marina Franco, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Masashige Ota, is present.
Attorney, Aaron Farmer, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Michael Lee, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUL-06-2010 is vacated.
